textByHashes.e8fb2daddb2e4c4dfe9d88da7c117054114a9958: Yes, it's a very interesting one this. Do you know of the cadava bush?
textByHashes.e772ff5dc2591080af413d8964bf5f1541f25b46: You were helping your arm? I'm not sure I need to know about your private life...
textByHashes.e3f930100611867c3d9e0c7b5f228eb1ef0ca27b: Maybe we should get back to what I was saying...
textByHashes.d67bf7ab30fa099b63aeb1f8b172c13816f8264b: As most people know, cadava berries are quite poisonous. When used in the right quantity, they can put someone into a deep sleep. Use the wrong amount...
textByHashes.18c4ace2c0e05801d5a1e904431ae1cb4ffc0141: Well, the thing about cadava berries is that they're not the only part of the bush that's dangerous. If you're not careful, the bark can have quite a nasty effect on the skin.
textByHashes.a0f4abc5fd3516a9dbefe2c4ad85c08980a32d89: Maybe, but you won't find any of those bushes this far south. It's quite unexpected. I don't think anyone in Sophanem would even recognise cadava bark, let alone figure out it caused the pox.
textByHashes.c91a1b65c8200807591d38e1121f87640bd3a27e: To be honest, I probably wouldn't have suspected it myself either. I only realised because of the time I spent training with the Apothecary in Varrock.
textByHashes.9f5b80bf6159f5963200ed987d09b37010c8b021: The lesser gods? It can't be!
textByHashes.ea51669b41fc832f39a15579bdb2fa052da82b83: Do not doubt the will of the Devourer, Maisa. She is a force of pure evil.
textByHashes.65fcb61274227c12a49993848baa6bf3440b9abf: Maisa has already obtained most of what I need. All that's left now is some scarab venom and a Lily of the Elid.
textByHashes.f5505423438670c93c4c1fad474ce9b59097ff65: That's right. I know of a small island just west of here where you can find some.
textByHashes.40556dda3cb70b58b3d4127a81c30b4a8f822f68: Hello again. Do you need anything?
textByHashes.27492dbd9d4211010d9d0dd937330640db3d597a: There's a small island just west of here where you should be able to find some.
textByHashes.71d8f3c806d810c84931188dff70b08ebb01242e: Welcome back. Do you have a Lily of the Elid?
textByHashes.6098d0bee49d44cb01da1088a11764b7803f3d75: Well, there's a small island just west of here where you can find some.
textByHashes.8369c40b989bc385e713ffc7303d79c56186ed55: I think I have everything I need to make the cure now.
textByHashes.aac77174a9b7c5057236e0124f24edc6ebf08170: Actually, I think you can. To make the cure, I'll need to get the ingredients to just the right temperature. While I get them prepared, could you get my equipment heated up?
textByHashes.d454d83b5c1077bc033ce0b838e6d0d373394a65: Just adjust the individual heats until the overall temperature is at the marked level. Be warned, the equipment can be a bit temperamental sometimes.
textByHashes.c33cf5f82f99a585ac8f55fbd4baba454b7c402f: Excellent! I think I have it!
textByHashes.05d0c457c3f78ccfc4ad90a4c5fbda1be2b3f7c0: Now, it's going to take a few batches of this to cure everyone in Sophanem. I'll get started on those right away. In the meantime, I can give you the first batch to take down there now.
textByHashes.b7349783d89129a0e26810dea33b796615c90898: Here's the first batch for you to take to the High Priest of Icthlarin. Let him know that I'll be sending down the rest once it's done.
textByHashes.fea0ef271a02819cb8b462aa804be8ff394cf1bf: Yes, here it is. Let the High Priest know that I'll be sending down the rest once it's done.
textByHashes.c98618d8e1c93a0a5ac91d4dc9f25119c6e76b2d: You lost a whole crate? How?
textByHashes.49dc1edecadc215b3f41039da367a4f83de84c95: Well I have the next batch ready now, so you can take that.
textByHashes.067e78382fae621529365cbc46180d0043c7c792: It needs delivering to the High Priest of Icthlarin in Sophanem. Let him know that I'll be sending down the rest once it's done.
textByHashes.9493c2e87240deb63678b027139c853a734539a8: Hi there. Do you need anything? I can clean herbs for a fee of 200 coins per herb. I can clean all of your herbs at once, or I can do individual herbs if you show them to me.
textByHashes.cdcca93f7e5952c0f38b47c5415c517c83fa01cd: I can also decant your potion vials to into different doses. That service is free so long as you have the empty vials needed. If not, it's just a few coins.
textByHashes.1754033c04cfedb04260e84bc63160a295149973: I didn't find anything that I could clean.
textByHashes.8d0b131722e8d09354130b3428d7c3515d0c3472: I don't think you've got anything that I can decant.
textByHashes.f2a1ac4d7c4d5339e244cc53251dc246376f198f: Many of my customers wish to sell the herbs which they can't clean to other adventurers. They might hope for a better price by doing this.
textByHashes.cc9afd4d733c21be459506f199c0dd4a656da2cc: I do not know where he came from. He came to Nardah recently, and said his business might help my customers, so I let him have some space out there.
textByHashes.dba7bec3ebfa3536c74423080ff6096ffcc1ba1b: He seems very lost in the world, but I hope his work will be a success for him.
textByHashes.1f1e5b491aa6383a2c4a8aa25aadd93587a5903a: Now, would you like me to clean your herbs or combine your potions?
